part.text:
- `bash`: Execute shell commands
- `edit`: Find-and-replace text edits in files
- `glob`: Pattern-based file finding
- `grep`: Regex content search across files
- `read`: Read files or directories
- `skill`: Load specialized skill instructions
- `task`: Delegate complex multi-step work to sub-agents
- `todowrite`: Create/manage task todo lists
- `webfetch`: Fetch and convert web page content
- `websearch`: Real-time web search with scraping
- `write`: Write or overwrite files
